debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
p_large_enough : Fact (p > 512)
programSize : ℕ
inst✝¹ : NeZero programSize
program : Fin programSize → F p
h_programSize : programSize < p
memorySize : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero memorySize
memory : Fin memorySize → F p
h_memorySize : memorySize < p
⊢ InductiveTable.Completeness (F p) State unit (fun x x => True) (fun x => True)
    (fun initial_state x i x state =>
      @Examples.FemtoCairo.nextStateCircuit.match_3 p (fun x => Prop)
        (Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i)
        (fun reachedState => state = reachedState) fun _ => False)
    fun state x =>
    (fun input =>
        subcircuitWithAssertion
          (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program h_programSize
            memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
          input)
      state

failed_attempts:
intro initial_state i
    simpa using (InductiveTable.completeness_of_soundness (T := femtoCairoTable program h_programSize memory h_memorySize) initial_state i)

intro initial_state i env state_var input_var state input h1 h2 h_inputs h_spec
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
    rcases h_spec with ⟨reached_state, h_eq⟩
    refine ⟨reached_state, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [h_eq]
    · intro h_env
      simpa [h_eq] using h_eq

intro initial_state i env state_var input_var state input h1 h2 h_inputs h_assumptions
    classical
    refine ⟨input, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [femtoCairoAssumptions] using h_assumptions
    · simpa using h2

simpa using (by
      classical
      refine (InductiveTable.completeness_trivial (R := fun (_ : State (F p)) (_ : unit) => True) ?_ ?_ ?_) <;> simp)

simpa using (InductiveTable.trivialCompleteness (R := fun _ _ => True) (Spec := fun _ _ _ _ _ => True)
      (step := fun state _ => (fun input =>
        subcircuitWithAssertion
          (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program h_programSize
            memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
          input) state))
